CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-10-2007 Dismissal Or Judgment On File As To All Defendants

Default Prove-Up.
Off Calendar Jun-26-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Susan Lee.
David Bowie, Esq. for Plaintiff: 720 Presidio Avenue Homeowners Association, a California non-profit mutual benefit corp.
Plaintiff's Witness: Paul Fortune, was sworn and examined.
After hearing the tetimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Robert G. Johnson as follows:
Principal $16,898.09
Prejudgment Interest $1,591.00
Attorney's Fees $1,850.00
Costs $392.00, for a total of $20,731.09
Judgment signed in open court.
